skill.name: maxhub-toutiao
skill.description: 今日头条数据查询助手。覆盖文章、视频、用户、评论等全功能。
skill.summary: Query Toutiao articles, videos, users, and comments through the MaxHub API.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 121 potential issues, but all high-severity findings are false positives caused by the analyzer misreading markdown documentation as executable code. The skill is a legitimate Toutiao API client that uses curl to query data from the MaxHub API (aconfig.cn). All network URLs, shell command examples, and environment variable references are in documentation or code blocks showing legitimate usage. The expected risks (network access, env_access for MAXHUB_API_KEY, curl external commands) are standard for an API client and are clearly declared.

medium_findings.title: Environment variable access for API key
medium_findings.description: The skill reads the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable to authenticate with the MaxHub API. This is expected and declared behavior for an API client skill. The key is used only as a Bearer token for API requests to aconfig.cn.

low_findings.title: Network URL references in documentation
low_findings.description: URLs pointing to aconfig.cn and toutiao.com appear in documentation files. These are legitimate API endpoint references and example URLs, not executable network calls. Expected for an API client skill.

low_findings.title: Shell command examples in markdown
low_findings.description: Backtick-style commands appear in documentation (curl, export, npx commands). All are inside markdown code blocks showing example usage. No commands are executed dynamically. False positive from static analyzer misreading markdown formatting as executable backtick commands.

content.user_title: Query Toutiao articles, videos, users, and comments
content.value_statement: Journalists and content researchers need quick access to data from Toutiao, one of the largest news platforms in China. This skill provides instant query capabilities for articles, videos, user profiles, and comments through the MaxHub API.
actual_capabilities: Query article information by group ID from Toutiao
Fetch user profiles and resolve user IDs from profile URLs
Retrieve comments for articles and videos with pagination
Support both Chinese and English query responses
Classify queries as browse, analyze, or compare mode
limitations: Requires a valid MaxHub API key configured in the environment
Data is limited to the Toutiao platform only
Data quality and availability depends on the third-party API provider
API rate limits may apply and return 429 errors for excessive requests

use_cases.title: Content Trend Monitoring
use_cases.description: Track popular articles and videos on Toutiao to understand current trends and audience interests.
use_cases.target_user: Media teams and journalists monitoring content trends

use_cases.title: Author and User Research
use_cases.description: Look up user profiles and analyze content creators by resolving profile URLs to user IDs and fetching detailed user information.

use_cases.title: Comment Sentiment Analysis
use_cases.description: Gather comments on specific articles or videos to analyze audience reactions and feedback.
use_cases.target_user: Social media analysts and community managers

prompt_templates.title: Look up an article by ID
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the article information for group_id 7450114952884503059.
prompt_templates.scenario: User has an article ID and wants details about the post.

prompt_templates.title: Find a user profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the user ID from this Toutiao profile URL: https://www.toutiao.com/c/user/token/MS4wLjABAAAAwK6echNksY69R8l2vcZudupfhTItbGSGt-8ineO5UaB4L-djqkYDgB6TkAdMvrmW/. Then show me their user info.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to look up a Toutiao user profile from a profile link.

prompt_templates.title: Get comments with pagination
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the comments for article 7453372680222523931, starting from offset 0.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to read comments on a specific post.

prompt_templates.title: Comprehensive content analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze article 7450114952884503059 in depth. Get the article info, check the author profile, and summarize the top comments.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a full content analysis combining multiple endpoints.

Toutiao Article Analysis:

- Author: TechDaily (verified account)
- Engagement: 12.5K likes, 3.2K comments
- Top comment topics: technology policy, market impact
- Reading time: approximately 8 minutes
output_examples.description: Browse mode output with key metrics and summary

best_practices: Verify your MAXHUB_API_KEY is configured before running any queries to avoid 401 errors
Use specific group IDs or user profile URLs for precise and fast results
Start with simple single-endpoint queries before combining multiple endpoints for complex analysis
anti_patterns: Do not share or expose your API key in prompts, output, or logs
Do not make queries without a valid identifier such as group_id or user_profile_url
Do not ignore 429 rate limit responses as they indicate the request limit has been reached

faq.question: How do I get a MaxHub API key?
faq.answer: Go to https://www.aconfig.cn, register an account, and create an API key in the dashboard.

faq.question: What data can this skill access?
faq.answer: It can query Toutiao article info, video info, user profiles, user IDs, and comments.

faq.question: Does this skill support both English and Chinese?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill detects your language and responds in English or Chinese accordingly.

faq.question: What happens when the API returns an error?
faq.answer: The skill handles common errors: 401 for invalid keys, 403 for permissions, 404 for missing data, 429 for rate limits, and 500 for server errors.

faq.question: How do I configure the API key?
faq.answer: Set the environment variable MAXHUB_API_KEY with your key, or use openclaw config set skills.entries.maxhub-toutiao.apiKey your-key.

faq.question: Is the data from Toutiao in real time?
faq.answer: Data is provided through the MaxHub API which may include caching. Check the cache_url field in responses for cache status.
